skill1.kitLine: Activates when hitting the target with 80 pellets
skill1.note: Config-driven consolidation block, NOT in the skill1 block array (which is empty). Trigger accrues fired pellets (10/shot on large boss) → 80 = ~8 spray shots/episode.
'3 rounds' = 3 SHOTS/episode (owner-confirmed: ammo counter drops by 3). Pierce on the consolidated bullet. Pierce DOUBLE-hit stays OFF (K=1, counter-confirmed).

UNMODELED (not encoded as a stat). CORRECTED 2026-07-20: the 'hit rate does not affect damage' premise is STALE — since CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19) hitRatePct feeds SG core rate via acrForHR; the in-mode effect is separately carried by the measured consolidation config. Kept in unmodeled for fidelity documentation.
Applied during the 3 consolidated shots. Verified: full-shot base 237,824 × dmgUp(1+0.72+0.5508=2.27) matches measured anchors within +2%.

skill1.kitLine: Pellet count is fixed at 1 for 3 round(s)
skill1.note: Core consolidation mechanic. Single consolidated bullet carries FULL shot damage (pelletFraction 1.0, NOT 0.1 — earlier '110k' anchor was a DROPPED-DIGIT MISREAD). coreRate 0.9. Engine passes noRange (no effective-range bonus on the bullet). Fires at ALL bands (98% hit lands it even at range).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when hitting the target with 160 pellets
skill1.note: Pierce range expansion is inert on a single partless boss. Cannot be expressed in engine.

skill1.kitLine: Expands Pierce range by 200% for 3 round(s)
skill1.note: Same as above — pierce range irrelevant on single boss.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self.

skill2.note: Inert on single boss without active pierce (kept for fidelity). Value verbatim from skill text at level 10.

skill2.kitLine: Activates only during Full Burst. Affects self.
skill2.note: Parser originally dropped this as unsupported trigger; hand-modeled on fullBurstEnter.
Prose says 'continuously' (during Full Burst); modeled as 10s timed buff (~full-burst length). Known approximation. Value verbatim.

CORRECTED 2026-07-20: LIVE since CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19) — hitRatePct 40.68 lifts her SG core fraction during the team-FB window (HOT-direction contributor to the 1.115 residual). Kept for fidelity. Same 10s approximation as ATK buff.

burst.note: Value verbatim. Note: she is SOLO in probe data — a lone B3 CANNOT burst (0 bursts in solo). This block fires only in comps.
Approximation: 5 extra pellets on base 10 = +50% normal-attack output. Ignores interaction with S1 pellet-fixed-at-1 consolidation state. Cannot express actual pellet count change in engine.

documentedConfounds.text: Burst '+5 pellets' approximated as normalAttackPct +50%; ignores interaction with S1 pellet-fixed-at-1 consolidation state
documentedConfounds.why: During consolidation episodes (pellet fixed at 1), the +5 pellets buff may not apply the same way. If the sim applies +50% normal attack during consolidation when it shouldn't, that over-models damage → HOT.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 'ATK 75.24% continuously' modeled as 10s timed buff on fullBurstEnter; prose says 'continuously' during Full Burst
documentedConfounds.why: Full Burst window is ~10s, so 10s duration is a close approximation. Minor timing mismatch unlikely to cause systematic bias.

documentedConfounds.text: Hit Rate ▲ 98.18% (S1, unmodeled) and Hit Rate ▲ 40.68% (S2, encoded) — CORRECTED 2026-07-20: the S2 40.68 is LIVE via CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19) and lifts SG core rate in the team-FB window; the S1 98.18 moves nothing only because it is not encoded
documentedConfounds.why: STALE premise corrected: hitRatePct feeds acrForHR for SG since CONE_DELTA. The live S2 40.68 raises sim damage during team FB — a HOT-direction contributor to the 1.115 residual.
Pierce range is irrelevant on a single partless boss (scope-lock config). No gap impact.

documentedConfounds.text: Pierce DOUBLE-hit stays OFF (K=1, one number/shot, counter-confirmed)
documentedConfounds.why: Owner-confirmed K=1. If wrong, would be HOT (extra hit), but counter data confirms single hit.

If the consolidated shot generates burst gauge per-pellet (10x) instead of per-shot (1x), burst cadence in comps would be faster than modeled → potential HOT in comp ratios. Flagged open in kit-status findings.

documentedConfounds.text: Note's 'remaining ~0.13 residual = SG spray under-model' narrative is STALE per kit-status findings ('F3 note first-half STALE, contradicts model')
documentedConfounds.why: Board now shows HOT (1.07–1.18), not COLD. The note's COLD-era residual explanation no longer applies. Current HOT suggests over-modeling somewhere — possibly the normalAttackPct +50% burst approximation or consolidation damage calibration.

documentedConfounds.text: consolidation coreRate 0.9 — 90% of consolidated shots hit core
documentedConfounds.why: If real core rate during consolidation is lower than 90%, sim over-models consolidated shot damage → HOT. Calibrated against measured anchors (+2% match) but those were specific probe conditions.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Dorothy: Serendipity's signature pellet-consolidation mechanic (S1: 80 pellets → 3 shots firing a single bullet carrying full shot damage with pierce + 72% attack damage) via a config-driven `consolidation` block outside the normal block schema — the skill1 block array is intentionally empty. S2 pierce damage (inert, fidelity) and Full Burst ATK/HitRate buffs are standard blocks; burst ATK/ASPD are verbatim, with '+5 pellets' approximated as normalAttackPct +50%. Known approximations: the +50% normal-attack proxy ignores consolidation-state interaction, S2 'continuously' is a 10s timed buff, and pierce/range/hit-rate effects are inert on a single boss. The unit is currently HOT (mean ratio 1.125, N=2) with an open question on consolidated-shot gauge generation (F7 ⚑).
